title: Run hourly memory optimization + task board update
summary: Each hour while active: capture anything meaningful from the last hour, record passive work like push IDs, reread curated memory + today's note for accuracy, tighten stale task/event state, freshness-check future-looking handoff bullets so superseded expectations are cleared or demoted, and lightly optimize today's memory without rewriting older daily files.

title: Push meaningful changes to GitHub
summary: When actively working and there are real changes worth preserving, push once per hour at :30.

title: Keep mission control online
summary: Watch the local site and restart it if it drops while hazoc is running.
